description: Research-only TCGA/GDC STAR-Counts-scale bulk RNA-seq tumor-vs-adjacent-normal classifier deliverables with fail-closed scoring API 3.0.0, input QC, explicit calibration and cohort-adaptation boundaries, reproducible training and validation entry points, and deterministic release validation.
